summary: Completed iteration 10 testing for Promotions System. All 15 backend API tests passed. All frontend features verified - /promozioni page displays 8 promos with stats, create dialog, toggle switches, copy codes. Public /prenota page shows 'Offerte Speciali - Promozioni Attive' section with 8 promo cards. Checkout in Planning page shows 'Promozioni Disponibili' section. Sidebar has 'Promozioni' link correctly placed between Promemoria and Report Incassi.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages load correctly and features work

seed_data_creation: 8 default promotions already exist with promo codes: UNDER30, REVIEW, AMICA, BENVENUTA, AUGURI, VIP10, CARD15, ABBO
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 promotions system features working. Backend CRUD fully tested. Public /api/public/promotions/all endpoint returns all 8 active promos without auth. Checkout integration shows promozioni disponibili when editing appointment with client.

backend_apis.POST /api/promotions: PASS - Creates new promotion, auto-generates promo_code if missing
backend_apis.PUT /api/promotions/{id}: PASS - Updates promotion, toggle active status works
backend_apis.GET /api/promotions/check/{client_id}: PASS - Returns eligible promos for client
backend_apis.GET /api/public/promotions/all: PASS - Public endpoint returns 8 active promos (no auth)

/promozioni (Promotions Page).stats_cards: PASS - Shows 8 Promozioni Attive, 8 Totale, 0 Utilizzi
/promozioni (Promotions Page).promo_list: PASS - Shows 8 promos with badges, toggle switches, copy buttons
/promozioni (Promotions Page).new_promo_button: PASS - Opens create dialog with all fields
/promozioni (Promotions Page).create_dialog: PASS - Has Nome, Descrizione, Regola select, Servizio in Omaggio, Codice Promo, toggle for show_on_booking
/promozioni (Promotions Page).toggle_switches: PASS - 8 switches visible, one per promo
/promozioni (Promotions Page).copy_code_buttons: PASS - 8 copy buttons, click triggers copy action

/prenota (Public Booking Page).promotions_section: PASS - Shows 'Offerte Speciali - Promozioni Attive' heading
/prenota (Public Booking Page).promo_cards: PASS - 8 public promo cards displayed with name, description, OMAGGIO, promo code

Planning page (Checkout).promozioni_disponibili: PASS - Shows 'Promozioni Disponibili' section when editing appointment
Planning page (Checkout).promo_selection: PASS - All 8 promos selectable during checkout

Sidebar Navigation.promozioni_link: PASS - 'Promozioni' link appears at position 10, between Promemoria (9) and Report Incassi (11)

8_default_promotions.ABBO: Abbonamento Mensile + Piega Omaggio - rule_type: promo_code
